class.name: FestivalDirector
class.brief_description: The brain that ties every subsystem together; exposed as [code]Festival[/code].
class.description: Owns the run lifecycle ([method begin_run] and [method end_run]) and evaluates the core rule [code]NPC_Reaction = Outfit + Held_Items + World_State_Flags + Knowledge[/code]. [method resolve_reaction] returns what an NPC currently perceives and the interactions it offers; [method apply_interaction] runs the chosen interaction's outcomes, learning knowledge, setting flags and moving items. Registered under the short name [code]Festival[/code].

signal.name: run_started
signal.description: Emitted by [method begin_run] after per-run state is reset and weather rolled.

signal.name: run_concluded
signal.description: Emitted by [method end_run] after the notebook is saved.

signal.name: interaction_applied
signal.description: Emitted after an interaction's outcomes are applied.
